examples: Does the college cafeteria provide a healthful diet?
People are sprawled on makeshift beds in the cafeteria.
I went and had an overpriced cup of coffee in the hotel cafeteria.
"It is worse than in-flight food, or at a cheap college cafeteria, " exclaimed her boyfriend.
George Hennard who killed 23 in a Killeen, Texas cafeteria, had definite paranoid thinking.
